creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #5)
> Created attachment 252801

I appreciate the work on adding the license information, but don't like some other changes:

 * Reducing indentation of the comments makes them invisible at build-time -- I deliberately placed them, where they are, so they'd be echoed by make "for free"
 * The PORTREVISION-bump is not warranted, the end-result is not changing, is it?

> The src/epoll.cpp patched multiple times.

That was deliberate -- the patches are grouped by the purpose, rather than by file. This is harder to create -- and regenerate -- but is far more useful in my opinion, when communicating with the upstream authors.

In this case, the difference is also by origin -- the patch-fix-select-call comes from an upstream bug-report...

> See also: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=fb2822ec470784a796e3a7fa8e52efdcf87b821d

Actually, it looks looks like pkubaj@ fixed this port similarly:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=5c4975a092a5

without a by-your-leave... The unconditional setting might break it for earlier releases -- where the older compiler has no vla-cxx-extension option (which was diizy's point in Comment #2) -- but no one seems to care now...

This PR can be closed, save for the LICENSE option -- could you change just that?
